title: Device Home Screen - Multiple devices - Turning off devices
scenario: Multiple paired Poly Bluetooth headsets show correct disconnected status in Poly Studio Mobile app when turned off one by one while other devices remain connected
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Pair and connect two or more Poly Bluetooth headsets (e.g., Device A and Device B) to the app.
Confirm both devices appear as 'Connected' on the Home screen.
Turn off Device A by pressing and holding its Power button.
Observe the Home screen for Device A's status.
Verify Device B remains listed as 'Connected' on the Home screen.
Turn off Device B by pressing and holding its Power button.
Observe the Home screen for Device B's status.
expected: When a device is turned off, it should immediately show as 'Disconnected' in the Poly Studio Mobile app. The remaining connected devices should stay listed as 'Connected'. Turning off all devices one by one should properly display each as 'Disconnected'.
